since_last: 58% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.34% · BTC +0.98% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 +1.23%. 58% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.84%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.84%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +10.68%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +10.68%, LRCX +10.32%, ARM +10.09%, AMAT +9.47%, TER +7.34%. Laggards: AVAV -6.19%, SOUN -4.26%, PLTR -3.87%, IBM -2.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.26% at $148.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
